name: Foldseek
description: Search protein structure databases with unprecedented speed using structural alphabet encoding. 4-5 orders of magnitude faster than traditional methods while maintaining high sensitivity. Efficiently handles large-scale structure databases by encoding tertiary amino acid interactions. Create custom databases directly from FASTA sequences using ProstT5 for 3Di prediction.
capabilities: Search protein structure databases with unprecedented speed using structural alphabet encoding
4-5 orders of magnitude faster than traditional methods while maintaining high sensitivity
Efficiently handles large-scale structure databases by encoding tertiary amino acid interactions
Create custom databases directly from FASTA sequences using ProstT5 for 3Di prediction

structure.description: Query protein structure file for database search

sequence.description: Protein sequence for ProstT5-based 3Di prediction and search
